from dataclasses import dataclass

@dataclass
class Triple:
    subject: str
    predicate: str
    object: str

# EVOLVE-BLOCK-START

import re
from typing import List

def _camel_to_words(text: str) -> str:
    """Convert camelCase or PascalCase predicate to a readable phrase."""
    # Insert space before capital letters (except the first) and lower the result
    s = re.sub(r'(?<!^)(?=[A-Z])', ' ', text)
    return s.lower()

def _predicate_phrase(predicate: str, obj: str) -> str:
    """Return a natural‑language fragment for a given predicate and object."""
    # Special handling for a few common predicates
    special = {
        "birthDate": f"was born on {obj}",
        "birthYear": f"was born in {obj}",
        "deathDate": f"died on {obj}",
        "deathPlace": f"died in {obj}",
        "birthPlace": f"was born in {obj}",
        "origin": f"originated from {obj}",
        "genre": f"is associated with the genre {obj}",
        "instrument": f"plays the {obj}",
        "occupation": f"is a {obj}",
        "nationality": f"is {obj}",
        "language": f"speaks {obj}",
        "officialLanguage": f"has {obj} as an official language",
        "capital": f"has its capital {obj}",
        "populationDensity": f"has a population density of {obj}",
        "areaTotal": f"covers an area of {obj}",
        "elevationAboveTheSeaLevel": f"is situated at {obj} meters above sea level",
        "foundingDate": f"was founded on {obj}",
        "activeYearsStartYear": f"started being active in {obj}",
        "activeYearsEndYear": f"ended activity in {obj}",
        "recordLabel": f"is signed to {obj}",
        "parentCompany": f"is owned by {obj}",
        "leader": f"is led by {obj}",
        "leaderTitle": f"has the title {obj}",
        "currency": f"uses the {obj} as currency",
        "demonym": f"its people are called {obj}",
        "anthem": f"has the anthem {obj}",
        "meaning": f"means \"{obj}\"",
        "longName": f"is officially known as {obj}",
        "postalCode": f"has postal code {obj}",
        "location": f"is located in {obj}",
        "governingBody": f"is governed by {obj}",
        "isPartOf": f"is part of {obj}",
        "derivative": f"is a derivative of {obj}",
        "musicFusionGenre": f"fuses with {obj}",
        "musicSubgenre": f"is a subgenre of {obj}",
        "stylisticOrigin": f"originates from {obj}",
        "bandMember": f"has member {obj}",
        "associatedBand/associatedMusicalArtist": f"is associated with {obj}",
        "background": f"has a background as {obj}",
        "alternativeName": f"is also known as {obj}",
        "training": f"was trained at {obj}",
    }
    if predicate in special:
        return special[predicate]
    # Default generic phrasing
    return f"{_camel_to_words(predicate)} {obj}"

def predict(triples: List[Triple]) -> str:
    if not triples:
        return ""
    fragments = []
    for triple in triples:
        subj = triple.subject
        phrase = _predicate_phrase(triple.predicate, triple.object)
        fragments.append(f"{subj} {phrase}")
    # Combine fragments into a fluent sentence
    if len(fragments) == 1:
        sentence = fragments[0] + "."
    else:
        sentence = ", ".join(fragments[:-1]) + ", and " + fragments[-1] + "."
    # Capitalize first character
    return sentence[0].upper() + sentence[1:]

# EVOLVE-BLOCK-END
